overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rolling prairie grasslands. The weather transitions from clear blue skies to dense fog during the clip, with a horse-drawn wagon briefly passing by on the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt trail

events.description: fog begins rolling in from the horizon reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the grassland

entered.detail: worn dirt path cutting through tall grass
rolling hills covered in tall green grass
wooden utility pole with wire lines visible against sky
scattered green shrubs along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open prairie grasslands under clear blue skies. A telegraph pole stands in the distance against the horizon. As the segment progresses, fog begins rolling in from the distance, gradually obscuring the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy prairie trail with wagon encounter

events.description: horse-drawn wagon appears on the right and moves ahead on the trail
visibility drops significantly as dense fog envelops the landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as fog sets in and a wagon passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: wooden wagon with driver moving ahead into the fog

entered.detail: old-fashioned horse-drawn wagon with driver seated on top

segments.scene_description: Dense fog rolls in rapidly as the character continues walking. A wooden horse-drawn wagon appears on the right, moves ahead on the trail, and disappears into the thick fog. Visibility drops significantly, obscuring the distant landscape and sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense fog prairie with limited visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through dense fog with limited visibility of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the dirt trail through the prairie, now completely enveloped in dense fog. The visibility is severely limited to just the immediate path ahead, with the surrounding grasslands barely visible through the gray mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail as a clear, open prairie is gradually consumed by a dense, blinding fog. It begins with the character walking through expansive grasslands under bright blue skies, with a lone telegraph pole marking the distant horizon. As the camera advances, a thick mist rolls in from the distance to obscure the landscape, just as a wooden horse-drawn wagon passes on the right and vanishes into the haze. The scene then shifts into a state of severely limited visibility, where the bright sky disappears and the surrounding grasslands fade into a gray void. Finally, the camera continues forward through the enveloping fog, with only the immediate path ahead remaining visible through the heavy mist.
